subject: Weekend plans?
body: Hey! Are you free this weekend? Was thinking we could go hiking or catch a movie. Let me know!

subject: Happy Birthday!
body: Wishing you a wonderful birthday! Hope you have an amazing day filled with joy and happiness. Love you!

subject: Dinner tonight?
body: Hey, are you coming home for dinner tonight? I am making your favourite pasta. Let me know by 5pm!

subject: Reunion next month
body: Hey! Our school reunion is next month on the 15th. It would be great to catch up with everyone. Are you coming?

subject: Check out this article
body: Hey I thought you might find this article interesting. It is about the latest trends in AI. Have a read when you get a chance!

subject: Thanks for your help!
body: Just wanted to say a big thank you for helping me move last weekend. I really appreciate it. Let me buy you dinner sometime!

subject: Movie night Saturday?
body: Hey! A bunch of us are getting together for a movie night on Saturday. Would love for you to join us. Starting at 7pm!

subject: Your Amazon order has shipped
body: Great news! Your order has been shipped and will arrive by Thursday. Track your package using the link below.

subject: Gym buddy needed!
body: Hey I just signed up at the new gym downtown. Looking for a workout buddy. Interested? They have a great deal for pairs!

subject: Recipe I promised you
body: Here is the chocolate cake recipe you asked for! Let me know how it turns out. Remember to use dark chocolate for best results.

subject: Congratulations on your promotion!
body: Just heard the amazing news about your promotion! You totally deserve it. We should celebrate this weekend!

subject: Can you dog sit next week?
body: Hey, I am going on a short trip next week and was wondering if you could look after Max for a few days. He is very well behaved!
